name: Neumans
description: What happen if beings from another world observe our world and they see we are dangerous? People on Earth are becoming increasingly greedy and corrupt, but technology is developing rapidly. Eventually, they would discover interstellar and interdimensional travel. But the Neumans are a highly developed civilisation and would rather not be dominated by Earth's humanity. Observing people on Earth, most of whom are preoccupied with money, violence and the pursuit of power. Yes, there are some individuals who are good, but they are a small percentage. In fact, they are literally a handful of people, because the rest of humanity has given in to their primal instincts.
creator: Chrisstopher1154865
